_source: Photos sourced from img1.wsimg.com (The Civil's GoDaddy CDN), thecivil.ca via Wayback Machine snapshots, Tripadvisor, and the owner's manually-collected Google Maps screenshots. See ASSETS.md.
_categorization: Photos go in 'interior' only when the room itself is the subject. A pizza on a table is in 'pies' even if the room is visible. Same for cocktails and flights.

items.alt: The Civil's neon cursive sign on a black accent wall, with a mounted cow skull, antelope head, painted gold-skull canvas, and an abstract painting beneath the ceiling beams and string lights.
A samoyed dog sitting next to a chalkboard outside The Civil that reads 'Wild Pies. Cocktails. Beer. (oh, and Margarita Flights).'
The Civil's bar with a 'cocktail lounge' red neon sign, the chalkboard logo above it, the BAR marquee, the pizza oven, and a 'DRINK GOOD GIN' sign.
The Civil's storefront at night — a black 'THE CIVIL · pizza cocktails beer' sign above neon PIZZA and OPEN signs in the window, with a small patio table out front.
Wide dining-room shot with damask wallpaper, leather banquette, brass lamps, and a chalkboard reading 'On Tap — Bellwoods Civil Lager'.
Wide view of the dining room with damask wallpaper, ceiling beams, banquette seating, and tables.
The Civil's neon sign above an antelope-skull mounted on damask wallpaper.
Pink neon 'get cozy' sign mounted above a wall of artificial sunflowers and roses.
The Wood Stone wood-fired pizza oven with flames glowing inside.
The bar from a wider angle showing the BAR marquee, cocktail lounge neon, the chalkboard logo, and the kitchen pass behind.
Black-and-white photo of two patrons seated at a banquette table beneath damask wallpaper and a deer-skull-style framed art.
Detail shot of damask wallpaper, leather banquette, and a floral-patterned plate on a rustic wood table.
A row of leather banquette seating against the damask wallpaper with rustic wood tables in the foreground.
A long table set for a group with multiple pizzas, flights, plates, and napkins mid-service.
Black-and-white photo of an illuminated marquee BAR sign mounted to a heritage-tannery beam.
Nighttime view of the Lang Tanning Company building façade with The Civil's signage on the ground floor.
Wide nighttime shot of the heritage Lang Tanning Company building with Communitech and D2L signage on the upper floors.
Pepperoni pizza in the foreground, mushroom pizza behind it, and a margarita cocktail on a wooden table.
A server holds out a mushroom pizza on a wooden board. The Civil's logo is tattooed on their forearm.
A server holds out a prosciutto and arugula pizza in front of a sunny window.
Top-down view of a prosciutto-and-arugula pizza on a wood-fired crust.
Top-down view of a prosciutto pizza with arugula, ricotta, and pear.
Pepperoni pizza in the foreground with a hand reaching for a slice.
A slice of pepperoni pizza being lifted from the pie, top-down close-up.
A pepperoni pizza held in two hands above a perforated tray.
Close-up of a pepperoni and mushroom pizza.
Side-angle close-up of a mushroom pizza on a wood table.
Pizza with eggs and red onion drizzled in BBQ sauce, top-down on a rustic wood plank.
Pizza with eggs and green onion drizzled with sauce, top-down on a perforated tray.
Donair-style pizza top-down on a wood-fired crust.
Chicken, tomato, and red onion pizza top-down on rustic wood.
Pesto pizza with chicken, tomato, and red onion, top-down.
Four pizzas arranged top-down on a wood table.
Pepperoni pizza close-up drizzled with hot honey.
Pizza with dill pickles, sesame seeds, and sauce drizzle, top-down.
A tall purple cocktail with a lemon wheel and paper straw on a Civil-branded napkin, with the dining room out of focus behind it.
Tall pink cocktail topped with rose petals and cinnamon, on a Civil-branded napkin in front of a teal tufted booth.
Whiskey sour in a crystal-cut tumbler with a dehydrated lime garnish, photographed against a row of red bokeh lights.
Whiskey sour topped with foam and a charred orange wheel, on a Civil-branded napkin.
Whiskey sour with foam and bitters dotted in a pattern across the top.
A negroni with a large ice block and blood orange peel, on a dark surface.
Gin cocktail with a dried pineapple wheel and rosemary sprig, lit by a vintage cut-glass lamp.
Two cocktails side by side — a tropical pineapple drink and a stirred amber drink — beside a vintage cut-glass jar.
Tall blue cocktail with a watermelon-wedge garnish on a Civil-branded napkin, beside a flight of pastel cocktails.
Tall purple cocktail topped with foam and a lemon wedge, with the dining room blurred behind.
Three amber whiskey sours topped with lemon-wheel garnishes lined up on a polished bar top.
A whiskey sour in the foreground with a margarita flight on a wooden flight board behind it.
A two-tier flight — chocolate, snickerdoodle, and cream-based pours on top, gin & tonics with berries below.
Macro close-up of a purple-and-pink cocktail flight with effervescent bubbles, lemon, and berry garnishes.
Gin & tonic flight in pastel mason jars on a wooden flight board.
Two flight boards side by side with eight cocktails total — fruit-garnished pours.
A pastel cocktail flight on a Civil-branded wooden paddle.
Bourbon hot chocolate flight — four mugs topped with whipped cream.
A four-mug holiday hot chocolate flight with chocolate, cookies, and a snowman-marshmallow garnish.
Cocktail flight with creamy white drinks, kiwi and strawberry garnishes, on a wood paddle.
Cocktail flight with strawberry and citrus garnishes against the damask wallpaper.
